channel.title: Panmnesia CXL GPU memory expansion - Bingחדשות
channel.copyright: זכויות יוצרים ‎\xc2\xa9 2026 Microsoft. כל הזכויות שמורות. לא ניתן להשתמש בתוצאות XML אלה, לשכפל אותן או לשדר אותן בכל אמצעי או לכל מטרה למעט לעיבוד תוצאות Bing בתוך צובר RSS לשימושך האישי שאינו מסחרי. כל שימוש אחר בתוצאות אלה מחייב אישור מפורש בכתב מ- Microsoft Corporation. על-ידי גישה לדף אינטרנט זה או שימוש בתוצאות אלה בכל אופן שהוא, אתה מביע את הסכמתך להיות כפוף להגבלות לעיל.

item.title: SK Telecom and Panmnesia Sign Partnership to Innovate AI Data Center Architecture, Enhancing Cost Efficiency and Performance
item.description: The above button links to Coinbase. Yahoo Finance is not a broker-dealer or investment adviser and does not offer securities or cryptocurrencies for sale or facilitate trading. Coinbase pays us for ...

item.title: SK Telecom and Panmnesia Sign Partnership to Innovate AI Data Center Architecture, Enhancing Cost Efficiency and Performance
item.description: As large-scale AI services grow, AI DCs are expanding GPU deployments, driving up costs. Recognizing the need for sustainable scalability, SKT and Panmnesia are focusing beyond simple GPU expansion to ...

item.title: SK Telecom and Panmnesia Sign Partnership to Innovate AI Data Center Architecture, Enhancing Cost Efficiency and Performance
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Panmnesia, an AI infrastructure link solution provider, today announced the signing of a strategic partnership with SK Telecom (SKT), South Korea’s largest telco and ...

item.title: SK Telecom and Panmnesia Sign Partnership to Innovate AI Data Center Architecture, Enhancing Cost Efficiency and Performance
item.description: SK Telecom and Panmnesia executives pose for a commemorative photo. (From left: Jason Lee, Head of Global Business Development at SKT; Yongjin Cho, CPO of Panmnesia; Myoungsoo Jung, CEO of Panmnesia; ...

item.title: SK Telecom and Panmnesia reshape Korea's AI data centers with CXL architecture
item.description: SKT says on the 4th that it signs an MOU with Panesia at MWC26 in Barcelona, Spain, to jointly develop a CXL-based next-generation AI DC architecture. From left, Jeong Seok-geun, head of SKT AI CIC, ...

item.title: Panmnesia expands into accelerator interconnects with UALink and Ethernet focus
item.description: Panmnesia has announced plans to expand its semiconductor interconnect portfolio to include accelerator‑centric technologies, after securing an R&D project valued at around $10 million targeting ...
